  "findings": [
    "Frayed and burned webbing on fall protection equipment",
    "Equipment fails pre-use inspection criteria"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the affected fall protection equipment from service",
    "Tag the equipment as unusable and destroy or return to manufacturer",
    "Replace with compliant, inspected fall protection gear before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1926 Subpart M and 1910.140, personal fall arrest systems must be inspected prior to each use for wear, damage, and other deterioration. Frayed or burned webbing severely compromises the tensile strength of the harness or lanyard, presenting an immediate, critical safety hazard that requires immediate removal from service.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)(21)",
    "OSHA 1910.140(c)(18)"
  ]
